calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. SPENCER WAN, ESQ. of Morgan Lewis, Tel No. 415-442-1126 appearing for Petitioner Manning & Napier Investor Services, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MANNING & NAPIER INVESTOR SERVICES, INC.'S Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PETITIONER SHALL SUBMIT A REVISED PROPOSED JUDGMENT THAT INCLUDES THE SUBSTANTIVE LANGUAGE OF THE ARBITRATION AWARD IN THE BODY OF THE PROPOSED JUDGMENT. THE PROPOSED JUDGMENT MAY BE E-MAILED TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)
